introSection: Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Silverwood Theme Park in Athol, Idaho, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster dates back to 1958, but its previous location is not known.

fullText:
Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Silverwood Theme Park in Athol, Idaho, USA.

The coaster dates back to 1958, but its previous location is not known.
